creator: sportarts@gmail.com
text:
Martin is welcome to take over maintainership.
I asked him not to break the www/openacs (and www/dotLRN) port.

Aldert

-----Original Message-----
From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.ORG]
Sent: donderdag 12 oktober 2006 17:31
To: aldert@nooitgedagt.net
Subject: Re: ports/104353: [UPDATE] www/aolserver to 4.5


Maintainer of www/aolserver,

Please note that PR ports/104353 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104353

-- 
Edwin Groothuis
edwin@FreeBSD.org
